description_long: This filing cabinet features a modern, two-tone design with one half finished in a dark wood veneer and the other in a matte gray material. The cabinet is rectangular and stands on short, sturdy black legs, elevating it slightly above the ground. On the gray side, there is a door with a visible handle and a key lock, while the wood side has an open shelf and a closed compartment, likely a drawer. The surfaces are flat and smooth, with clean, sharp edges and a minimalist aesthetic. The cabinet appears robust and functional, suitable for storing documents or office supplies. Its compact size makes it ideal for urban environments where space efficiency is important.
description: A compact, two-tone filing cabinet with wood and gray finishes, featuring a lockable door, open shelf, and drawer. Modern, sturdy, and space-efficient.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gray lockable door on the left and the wood-finished compartment on the right.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth and wood finish of the cabinet's right side.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the open shelf and the back of the lockable compartment.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gray finish and the cabinet's overall depth.
